author: IGN RSS
text:
Supergirl Confirmed for Man of Tomorrow as a "Major Part" of the DCU Going Forward
Supergirl will appear in Man of Tomorrow, as she will be a key piece of the DC universe going forward. In a new interview, DC Studios co-CEO Peter Safran emphasized that Supergirl is "a major part of what we’re doing."

author: IGN RSS
text:
The Boys Is Officially Over, and the Internet Has Plenty of Thoughts
Late last night, Amazon released the long-awaited series finale for The Boys, and it has led to a wide variety of reactions from fans.

author: IGN RSS
text:
The Adventures of Cliff Booth Lands IMAX Release Date Ahead of Netflix Debut
David Fincher's sequel to Once Upon a Time in Hollywood is coming to IMAX theaters this fall. Netflix has announced that The Adventures of Cliff Booth will get a two-week exclusive run in IMAX starting November 25th before eventually making its way to Netflix on December 23rd.

text:
Ubisoft Promises New Assassin's Creed, Far Cry, and Ghost Recon Games All by March 2029
Ubisoft has promised to release new Assassin’s Creed, Far Cry and Ghost Recon games all by the end of March 2029.
